creator: hdm@mistral.co.uk
text:
The muttzilla port creates a shared library, muttzilla.so.  However,
because the port gets run with bmake, it creates an empty shared
library.  Not very useful.

Fix: 

Add the line "USE_GMAKE=yes" to the port Makefile fixes the
	problem.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Try building, installing and using the muttzilla port.
